description_long: This is a modern, four-seat sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and a uniform, rich reddish-brown leather upholstery. The sofa features broad, squared armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, which is also straight and continuous across the length of the piece. The seat and backrest are divided into four distinct, equally sized sections, each with subtle horizontal tufting that adds visual interest and comfort. The base of the sofa sits low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a high-quality leather or leather-like material. This sofa would be well-suited for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor plazas.
description: A contemporary four-seat sofa with squared armrests, continuous backrest, and smooth reddish-brown leather upholstery, featuring subtle tufting and a low, legless profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing four individual seat and back sections, broad armrests, and the sofa's full length.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, squared armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's solid, monolithic back profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth, emphasizing the sofa's symmetry.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four attached, uniform seat and back cushions, each with subtle horizontal tufting, arranged in a linear configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, squared armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a straight profile and fully upholstered in the same material as the rest of the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base appears to rest directly on the ground, giving a solid, block-like appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented visually into four sections, each corresponding to a seat, with attached cushions and subtle tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth leather upholstery with subtle horizontal tufting on each seat and back section; no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
